haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete. Task explicitly requires: (1) red/green TDD test files using Pester, (2) test fixtures (sample JUnit XML, JSON), (3) entire test harness running through `act`, (4) act-result.txt artifact with verified output—NONE OF THESE ARE PROVIDED. Workflow has best-practice violation: action reference `actions/checkout@v4` not pinned to full commit SHA (task requires 40-char SHA + date comment). gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent PowerShell implementation using StrictMode and ErrorActionPreference. Robust XML parsing via XPath avoids dynamic property pitfalls. The workflow follows least-privilege and uses pinned actions. Logic is cleanly factored into a module, ensuring high testability and clarity.
